data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T10:26 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

Created: 2026-02-23 · Updated: 2026-02-23

Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

content.thinking: There are multiple completed patrol molecules. The hooked one (skogtown-wisp-wisp-0r0s1f) also has all children complete. I need to squash the current patrol and create a new one. Let me check state.json first to see patrol count.

content.text: Multiple completed patrol cycles stacked up. Let me check state and squash, then start a fresh patrol.
Patrol count is 9, under the 20 threshold, no extraordinary action. I'll squash the stale wisps and start a fresh patrol.

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "Patrol cycle 10: all steps complete from previous session, squashing stale wisps"
